race.description: Inglis Xtra Bonus Series Maiden Hcp
race.comment: ANYWAYS (6) went forward last start over 1000m at Bendigo and held on well for second, beaten a neck. Peaking now and has the talent to go one better. CLEAR BLUE DAY (2) is a son of Blue Point from the mare Clear For Take Off. Will strip fitter from a Rosehill trial run and looks one of the main chances. ORDINARY ANGEL (3) is on also on debut. By Harry Angel and comes from the Todd Howlett stable. Looks forward enough after a Beaumont (Newcastle) trial win. Pay to watch for any positive betting moves. CHERRY JUBILEE (9) makes her stable debut for the Treacy team. Was thereabouts in her two runs back down south and presents fresh off 52 days. Keeping safe.
